description: You are an ML perception engineer working on sim-to-real transfer for a warehouse delivery robot ('DELIVERY_BOT'). The simulation currently uses perfect, noiseless camera rendering which will cause your neural networks to fail in the real world. Configure the 'front_camera' on the 'DELIVERY_BOT' to simulate a low-cost CMOS sensor by setting the noise to 0.05, motion blur to 20.0, radial lens coefficients to -0.3 and 0.05, focal distance to 1.2, and focal length to 0.02. Save the configured world file to /home/ga/Desktop/sim_to_real_camera.wbt.
